category_sources: Official sntop homepage describes an ncurses top-like console utility for monitoring network host connectivity.
source_facts.description says it polls hosts to determine connectivity.
display_name_sources: Official sntop homepage title is sntop - simple network top.
docs_sources: Official homepage points to the SourceForge project page where everything is hosted.
source_facts.homepage is the official sntop homepage.
repo_sources: Official sntop homepage states the SourceForge project page is where everything is hosted.
source_facts.source-archive is downloaded from the official SourceForge sntop project.
tags_sources: Official sntop homepage mentions ncurses, fping/ping, top-like display, and host connectivity monitoring.
source_facts.description and executables identify a curses-based connectivity utility.
